allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([c['label'] for c in d['config']['components']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['user_id','resolved_roles','access_path']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([a['action_id'] for a in data]\)")
Bash(python -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) cards = d['config']['components'] print\(f'{len\(cards\)} cards:'\) for c in cards: print\(f\\" - {c['label']} \({c['page_id']}\)\\"\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) config = d['config'] print\(f\\"Page: {config['title']} \(layout: {config['layout']}\)\\"\) comps = config.get\('components', []\) print\(f'{len\(comps\)} sub-pages:'\) for c in comps: print\(f\\" - {c.get\('label',''\)} \({c.get\('page_id',''\)}\)\\"\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) config = d['config'] meta = d.get\('meta', {}\) data = d.get\('data', []\) print\(f\\"Page: {config['title']}\\"\) cols = config.get\('columns', []\) print\(f\\"Columns: {len\(cols\)}\\"\) for c in cols[:5]: print\(f\\" - {c['key']}: {c.get\('label',''\)} \(access: {c.get\('access',''\)}\)\\"\) if len\(cols\) > 5: print\(f' ... +{len\(cols\)-5} more'\) print\(f\\"Rows: {len\(data\)}, Total: {meta.get\('totalCount','?'\)}, Filtered: {meta.get\('filteredCount','?'\)}\\"\) masks = meta.get\('columnMasks',{}\) if masks: print\(f'Masks: {masks}'\) ")
Bash(python -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) comps = d['config']['components'] print\(f'{len\(comps\)} modules visible to PE user'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'{len\(data\)} records \(showing 3\)'\) for d in data[:3]: print\(f\\" [{d['action']}] {d['resource_type']}:{d.get\('resource_id',''\)} by {d['user_id']}\\"\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for ds in data: print\(f\\"{ds['source_id']}: {ds['display_name']}\\"\) print\(f\\" tables={ds.get\('tables',0\)} mapped={ds.get\('mapped',0\)} unmapped={ds.get\('unmapped',0\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" profiles={ds.get\('profile_count',0\)} next={ds.get\('next_action',''\)}\\"\) ")
